description: Detects classes with destructor but missing copy/move constructors or assignment operators (Rule of Five) in C++. Simplified from Rust: flags all class_specifier and struct_specifier nodes (warning severity) without checking for destructor presence, special member function completeness, defaulted/deleted members, or NOLINT suppression. Higher false-positive rate -- all classes and structs are flagged.

flag.message: Class/struct definition detected -- verify Rule of Five compliance: if a destructor is defined, all five special members (destructor, copy/move constructor, copy/move assignment) should be explicitly defined or deleted
